description: SW TILE_REQUEST message has no main-thread listener. Service Worker broadcasts TILE_REQUEST via self.clients.matchAll() and waits 10s. No addEventListener for TILE_REQUEST in main thread. Every tile request times out, triggers exponential backoff, returns transparent 1x1 pixel placeholder.
resolution: Wire TILE_REQUEST listener in main.ts or dedicated sw-bridge module that reads from tilePipeline IndexedDB and responds to SW.

title: Two separate IndexedDB databases for image data
rationale: Four separate IndexedDB databases with no coordination: (1) biiif-archive-db (v6): project state + original files, used by SW IIIF Image API via direct IDB. (2) field-studio-tiles (v1): pre-generated tile pyramids, accessed by severed TILE_REQUEST bridge. (3) field-studio-discovery: change tracking / activity log. (4) biiif-integrity-db: file integrity checksums. No cross-database transactions, no version coordination, no unified schema.

description: IngestWorkerPool throws 'Worker pool not yet implemented in Svelte migration' on any call. Tile pyramid generation non-functional. Combined with severed TILE_REQUEST bridge, tile path doubly dead: tiles never generated AND SW cannot retrieve them.
resolution: Implement IngestWorkerPool for Svelte or replace with single-threaded tile generation as interim. Decide if tile pyramid still needed vs on-demand IIIF Image API scaling.

name: IIIF Image API works via direct IDB, tile path is severed
description: Two image serving paths in SW: (1) /iiif/image/ works — SW opens biiif-archive-db directly via getFileBlob()/getFromIDB(). (2) /tiles/ broken — requires main-thread bridge via TILE_REQUEST with no listener. Only path 1 functional.

content: OPFS fallback has 1-second timeout race. Promise.race with 1s timeout on OPFS access — slow file system silently returns null, caller assumes OPFS unavailable. No retry, no longer timeout for known-slow operations.

description: Blob URL cleanup not wired in ViewerView. Component declares objectUrl variable for cleanup but never assigns it from resolveImageSource(). resolvedImageUrl derived from item._blobUrl or body.id but not tracked in objectUrl. Blob URLs created by image source resolver may leak on unmount.
resolution: Wire resolveImageSource result to objectUrl tracking. Revoke all blob URLs in onMount cleanup. Or use centralized blob URL registry.

description: Tile info.json routing incomplete in SW fetch handler. handleTileInfoRequest() has full implementation but fetch event listener does not match /tiles/{assetId}/info.json pattern correctly. Info.json requests for tile manifests return 404 despite handler code existing.
resolution: Fix fetch event routing to match TILE_INFO_PATTERN and dispatch to handleTileInfoRequest().

name: SW failure backoff invisible to UI
description: Service Worker tracks asset failures with exponential backoff (1s to 5min after 10 failures). Main thread has no visibility into which assets are in backoff. UI cannot show degraded-mode indicator. User sees blank tiles with no explanation. clearFailures action exists in SW but no getFailureStats integration.

name: Cache eviction breaks tile pyramid coherence
description: LRU eviction removes tiles by access timestamp without considering pyramid dependencies. Evicting level-0 (base) tile makes all higher levels inaccessible (orphaned tiles). Zoom-out tiles can be deleted while zoom-in tiles remain, causing visual holes in the viewer.

SearchService returns empty results. All search methods in searchService.ts marked TODO: Copy full implementation from React source, return empty arrays. Search feature renders UI but finds nothing. Entire search functionality is non-functional.
resolution: Port search implementation from React source or implement new search with existing shared/stores/search.svelte.ts index.

content: Canvas._fileRef not validated after JSON round-trip. _fileRef typed as optional File but if entity passes through JSON serialization (storage save/load), _fileRef becomes a plain object. URL.createObjectURL(_fileRef) fails. imageSourceResolver.ts:304 has instanceof Blob guard but other sites may not.

name: SW implements full IIIF Image API 3.0 Level 2
description: public/sw.js contains a complete IIIF Image API 3.0 Level 2 server: region extraction, size scaling, rotation, mirroring, quality transformations via OffscreenCanvas. Generates info.json responses with tile and size descriptors. The /iiif/image/ path is the only functional image serving path — it opens biiif-archive-db directly without main-thread bridge.

name: SW exponential backoff failure tracker
description: Service Worker tracks per-asset failures with exponential backoff: 1s initial delay, doubling per failure, capped at 5 minutes after 10 consecutive failures. Backoff state persisted in memory (lost on SW restart). clearFailures action available via postMessage but no UI integration. Main thread has zero visibility into which assets are in backoff.

title: Global OpenSeadragon export required for Annotorious
rationale: main.ts line 5-7: imports OpenSeadragon and assigns to globalThis. Required because Annotorious and OSD plugins hardcode window.OpenSeadragon access. Intentional single-point assignment at app init. Alternatives (context/prop passing, lazy-load) rejected due to external library constraints.
